description.en: Blush Stay Hard Beaded Cock Rings are specially designed for men who want a harder, longer lasting and more intense performance experience. Can be used as a penis ring, testicle ring or double wrap band. 🔥 Highlights ✔ Body Friendly MaterialLaboratory tested, phthalate-free, skin-friendly TPE material. ✔ Beaded DesignSpecial beaded surface structure offers extra stimulation and enhanced sensation experience. Supports Harder and Longer Lasting ErectionsBy supporting blood flow, it can help fuller, harder and longer lasting performance. Durable and Flexible ConstructionPremium quality rubber stretchable construction provides safe and comfortable use. ✔ Delay SupportIt can help control ejaculation and support increased stamina. 💧 Use and Care Compatible with silicone-based, water-based and hybrid lubricants. Cleans easily with warm water and soap. It dries quickly and can be hygienically stored in its original packaging. 🎁 Suitable for: Men who want to improve their performance Users who aim for harder and fuller erections Those who want to increase excitement for couples Those looking for a gift alternative Blush Stay Hard Beaded Cock Rings offer a combination of performance and pleasure for both solo and partnered experiences. It is the ideal men's accessory for those looking for comfort, flexibility and intense sensation.
